nasb.text: His mischief will return upon his own head, And his violence will descend upon his own pate.

esv.text: His mischief returns upon his own head, and on his own skull his violence descends.

cnv.text: 他的惡毒必回到自己的頭上， 他的強暴必落在自己的頭頂上。

ccb.text: 他们的恶行临到自己头上， 他们的暴力落到自己脑壳上。

csbs.text: 他的祸患将归到自己的头上， 他的残暴将落在自己的头顶。
